name: Material-like
summary: MD3-flavored bundle — comfortable density, natural motion, lift surfaces, generously rounded corners. Exercises every optional field of the manifest schema.

name: Acme Brand
summary: A colors-only brand — the minimal end of the schema. Overrides the accent token and otherwise inherits every platform default.

name: Web Everything Docs
summary: The WE-docs site's own brand bundle — Indigo-600 accent, Slate text, comfortable density, natural motion — so FUI components mounted into the dogfooded WE-docs chrome (#777/#865) render in the site's own branding. The first real-consumer bundle (vs the material-like / acme-brand demo bundles).
